description: Beautifully updated 3-bedroom home in a quiet neighbourhood. Open-concept main floor, chef's kitchen with granite countertops, and a finished basement. Walking distance to top-rated schools.
Spacious 4-bedroom executive home with 3 full baths. Hardwood floors throughout, gourmet kitchen, and a large backyard deck. Minutes from shopping and transit.
Well-maintained family home with mature trees. New roof (2021), updated bathrooms. Close to parks and community centre.
4-bed home on a corner lot. Large eat-in kitchen, main-floor laundry, double garage. Close to schools and LRT station.
Modern 2-bedroom condo in the heart of the Glebe. In-suite laundry, underground parking, rooftop terrace. Walk to Lansdowne Park.
Immaculate 4-bedroom, 3-bath home. Finished rec room, gas fireplace, newly landscaped yard. Ideal for growing families.
End-unit townhouse with single garage. Updated kitchen, hardwood on main floor. Quiet cul-de-sac near Costco and shopping.
Luxury 5-bed, 4-bath home in prestigious Kanata Lakes. Open-to-above great room, quartz counters, inground pool. Top school district.
Charming 3-bedroom bungalow in Westboro. Original hardwood, updated kitchen. Large lot — great for a home addition or laneway suite.
Well-cared-for 4-bedroom home. Finished basement with full bath, sunken living room, double driveway. Close to CHEO and schools.
Stylish 3-bedroom home with open layout. Stainless appliances, stone fireplace, composite deck. Near Rideau River trail.
Brand-new 1-bed condo with stunning city views. Quartz counters, in-suite laundry, premium finishes. Pets welcome.
